hook: Bangalore keeps building upward while the ground underneath gets harder to read.

topic: TCS and anthropic partnership for providing 50k associate with AI access

topic: New autonomous models agents of Open AI , , workplace Agentic AI
hook: Most organisations are not ready for agentic AI. Not because the technology is too advanced. Because their processes were never designed to be delegated to anything.
